g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the IMDB data loading step in the BiLSTM code')
sendPrompt('Explain the reverse index decoding in load_imdb_dataset')
sendPrompt('How does the TextPreprocessor class work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the clean_text method in TextPreprocessor')
sendPrompt('Explain sequence padding in the preprocessing')
sendPrompt('Explain the train val test split strategy')
sendPrompt('Explain the embedding strategies: trainable vs GloVe')
sendPrompt('Explain GloVe transfer learning embedding matrix')
sendPrompt('Explain BiLSTM Baseline architecture in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Stacked BiLSTM with residual connections')
sendPrompt('Explain BiLSTM with multi-head self attention')
sendPrompt('Explain callbacks: early stopping and LR scheduling')
sendPrompt('Explain class weight computation for imbalanced data')
sendPrompt('Explain the evaluation metrics and Youden J statistic')
sendPrompt('Explain visualization outputs: ROC, confusion matrix, comparison')
